---
name: New Plugin Proposal
about: Propose a new plugin for a commerce protocol or platform
title: "[Plugin] "
labels: new-plugin
---

## Protocol / Platform

Name and link to the official specification or documentation.

## Why This Plugin?

What real-world problem does it solve? What can developers build with it?

## Proposed Scope

- **Agent:** What conceptual knowledge would the expert subagent cover?
- **Skills (minimum 3):** What distinct areas would the skills address?
- **Hooks:** What safety hooks are needed (secret detection, CLI protection)?

## Overlap Check

Have you reviewed the existing plugins to confirm this doesn't duplicate existing coverage?

- [ ] Yes, this covers a distinct protocol/platform not already included

## Additional Context

Any relevant links, sample implementations, or integration guides.
